'''''Scum and Villainy''''' is the first expansion set of the [[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game|''Jedi Knights'' Trading Card Game]] and was published on [[July 11]], [[2001]].

This expansion pack contained new themes of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] (purple), [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] (blue), [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] (yellow) and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] (orange). A new force card color (orange) was also added. This expansion pack was focused on Independent characters, mainly bounty hunters, and added the possibility of creating an Independent-themed deck.
{{Card-stub}}
